data.current_description: Search for company data by company name. Returns matching company information including revenue, founders, industry, and other details.
data.description_suggestion: Search for company data by company name using GET method. Accepts a company name query parameter and returns a CompanyResult object containing detailed company information including revenue, founders, industry, employee count, and other business details. Returns a single matching company record or an error if no match is found.

data.current_description: Retrieve a list of all previous searches with their metadata and status.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a paginated list of all previous searches performed by the authenticated user, including their metadata and current status. Returns an array of SearchResult objects containing search ID, query parameters, creation timestamp, completion status, and result count. Useful for tracking search history and identifying completed searches available for download.

data.current_description: Upload a CSV file containing company names for bulk search. Supports callback URL for completion notification.
data.description_suggestion: Create a bulk search by uploading a CSV file containing company names. Accepts a BulkSearchRequest object with CSV file data and optional callback URL for asynchronous completion notification. Returns a BulkSearchResponse containing the search ID and initial status. The search processes asynchronously; use getSearchResult to poll for completion status or provide a callback URL to receive notifications when processing completes.
data.reasoning: Description lacks information about response structure, asynchronous processing behavior, and how to track completion. data.current_description: Retrieve the results and status of a specific search by ID.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve the results and status of a specific search by its ID. Accepts a searchId path parameter and returns a SearchResult object containing the search query, current processing status, completion timestamp (if finished), and array of CompanyResult objects with matched company data. Use this endpoint to poll for bulk search completion or retrieve results from any previous search.
data.reasoning: Description lacks specificity about input parameter requirements and response structure. Added explicit mention of searchId parameter, SearchResult and CompanyResult schema types, and clarification about polling behavior for bulk searches to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Download the results of a completed search as a CSV file.
data.description_suggestion: Download the results of a completed search as a CSV file. Accepts a searchId path parameter and returns a CSV file containing all matched company records with columns for company name, revenue, founders, industry, and other business details. Only available for searches with completed status; returns an error if the search is still processing. The CSV file is generated on-demand and streamed directly to the client.
data.reasoning: Description lacks details about input requirements, response format specifics, preconditions, and error handling.
